<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create a new Invoice"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/invoice/v1/invoice/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new Invoice
### Permissions

| Auth Method | Required Permissions |
|---|---|
| [API Key](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#api-key-auth) | All permissions (admin access) |
| [Basic Auth](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#basic-auth) | `Can add payment requests` or `Can add e-commerce payments` + `Can add Invoice` |

> **Gateway permission**: `Can use pg_code` for the target [payment gateway](/developers/payments/payment-methods/)
